feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Apps
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Apps Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - IOS SDK version warning
entry.content:
Dear SAP Build Apps Team,

A few of our latest iOS builds returned a warning from Apple mentioning that from April 29, 2024, all iOS apps shall be built with iOS 17SDK or later. While the current SDK in use is iOS 16.2 SDK. 

This post here is just a request and a notification to raise awareness of this issue. 

Best regards.

PS. We just want to avoid last year's case where iOS builds were not accepted by Apple for a few weeks until the issue has been resolved. So we'd be glad if this issue got priority and matched the deadlines set out by Apple.

entry.title: How to handle if-match header via BTP destination?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am trying to achieve a patch call using Build APPs with a required if-match header, how can this be handled via BTP destination for REST API. In this case I am using Service Cloud V2 Case API: https://tenantid/sap/c4c/api/v1/case-service/cases/UUID

Your valuable response is much appreciated.

entry.title: Error when I set the data source of a data action in Build Apps
entry.content:
I have a Build App project where I have a dropdown that I want to set a data source on.  I created an Action with a GET request for months within a given year.  When I test the action, I get a 200 response and 12 months come back.  I then release and publish the action to the library.

When I try to add that action as a Data Source, I get this message. I've tried waiting but I get the same thing every time.

I'm hoping that someone has had this issue before and knows of a solution.

Thanks in advance!

Ron

entry.title: Using an OData API get records back to back in a single page by clicking a button in SAP Build Apps.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using an OData API which is carrying around 1000 of records, we are calling first 20 records through pagination in data variable, is there any way to call the rest of the data in a form of 20 records in a repetitive manner on the same page by configuring a button in SAP Build Apps.

Thanks in advance,
Yashmin

@Dan_Wroblewski , @marihirvi , @StephanKoenig , @Ian_Thain , @SandipAgarwalla

entry.title: SAP Build apps upload files intergrate to process automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to integrate files upload from SAP Build Apps into my process automation approval inbox. To achieve this I have followed below steps.

Step1: created a process automation creating input variable type as upload file as shown below :

Step2 :Created a project in SAP Build Apps for upload document as shown below

Step3: Map the variables at data level in SAP Build Apps

When I execute the build apps Form document is upload successfully I am getting toast message as below 

But the issue is unloaded document is not coming to inbox of my process automation, Please advice any suggestion to resolve this issue.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: In Build Apps, Row Cells are Changing Their Width
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to create a grid, like a blank calendar where I can insert data into the cells from a data source.  I created a container and put 5 rows in it with 7 columns in each row.

The top row is where I wanted to put the days of the week as a header so I started by putting a text component in the first cell of the first row.

When I did that, the width of that cell increased, throwing off the borders of the cells for the other rows.  I tried setting the minimum and maximum width of the container, the rows and each cell within the row and it still does it.  

This is what it look like before I add the text:

And this is what it looks like when I add the text field:

Is there a way to absolutely lock the width of a cell in a row?  I know they are actually containers so I'm a little puzzled about this.

Thanks for any and all suggestions!

Ron

entry.title: Create a New Button and Add it to a Container Using Custom JavaScript in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a container that I want to dynamically add a button to using custom JavaScript when I click a button that already exists in the form.

This is the code I've tried and i know that the Component ID of the container is correct but the button isn't showing up.  I'm guessing that maybe I'm not creating the button correctly?  Also, I haven't done anything with the inputs or Outputs.  Is that something that I would need to do?

const container = document.getElementById("9f1b57c7-72a2-4d17-9c20-91ab6dbecc4c");
const newButton = document.createElement("button");
newButton.textContent = "Click Here";
container.appendChild(newButton);

Thanks in advance!

Cheers,

Ron

entry.title: Can I use DOX Custom Schemas (w/ AI functionality) with the DOX SDK in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,

Can I use DOX Custom Schemas (w/ AI functionality) with the DOX SDK in SAP Build Process Automation?

I know that premium version is needed. 

If yes, how can I enhance the DOX SDK.

 

Thanks !

Tillbtp

entry.title: Build apps backend session not released
entry.content:
Hi

We have conenected Build apps to S4 backend vua BTP, SCC and Gateway OData service

When App is openened in "Preview" mode, it creates 7 dialogue sessions in the backened

Also when the App/browser is closed, backend session is not released in S4

Anyone faced this issue

Regards

MB

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - How to do Data Refresh for Marketplace installed component?
entry.content:
One of SAP Build App's page development, using marketplace installed component "Basic list with selection on right" and bound to SAP standard OData service /API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product. How to do based on search condition or button click to refresh data shown in the list? List bound directly to data source via Data Adapter instead of data variable. Unable to reload data in the list and tried with list component's template editor, added 'Fired from "Trigger event"' and connected to the "Data | Get record collection" in component's internal flow logic. But this event neither visible outside of component in a page nor other components in a page to consume.

   

SAP Build

entry.title: SAP Build Apps: App doesnt get user information
entry.content:
Hi,

i have a problem with the system variable "systemVars.currentUser.email" (also the other ones like firstname or lastname) which reads the mail from the currently logged in user.
Its working on the preview app for one time, but after reloading the page, the variable is empty.

When I deploy the app and use it, it's empty everytime. 

In the developer tools from Chrome I can see, that this user API is triggered: /user-api/currentUser/
The query works and it returns my name, mail and some other information, but the systemvar variable is still empty.

Can somebody help me here?

Thanks,
Vincent

entry.title: migração Appgyver para SAP BUILD
entry.content:
Não consegui fazer a migração AppGyver Community para nova plataforma SAP BUILD para data 31/01/2024. Não consigo recuperar senha, logar, entrar, na antiga plataforma e exportar para importar meu projeto no SAP BUILD. O suporte consegue me recuperar projeto ReceitasPaganini please, socorro!

Receitas Paganini

entry.title: BTP Trial Account - Cannot access ABAP Cloud project via ADT after SAP Build Booster
entry.content:
Hi, 

In my BTP trial account, I subscribed for SAP Build through booster and now I cannot log into my account using Eclipse. I am getting following error message - 

Error while logging on to the service instance using this project. Please make sure that you are logging on with <user_email> (<id>). 

I am searching online but I cannot understand why this is happening. Any help is appreciated.

Regards

ASM

entry.title: How to create authentication(Sign up and login page) page in sap build apps ?
entry.content: I am creating an app using sap build apps. How can i create register and login page? In appgyver we have firebase. But for build apps is there any way?

entry.title: SAP Build apps
entry.content:
Hi team,

I check the 'SAP Build with SAP Business One Hands-On-Presentation 12/07/23' and trying to develop the build apps through Appqyver.

Based on this i have done  oData Integration in community edition and done login page as  well as.

But login in is not successful with the real Database details.

Kindly help me to solve the issue.

Attached screenshot for your reference.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps / Focus input not working
entry.content:
Hi,

Has anybody already used the View Function "Focus input"?

Expectation:

If the Focus input function is used on a the Event "Page mounted" I would expect to set the cursor focus on the field, that was chosen behind the focus input function.

Result:

Currently the focus isn't set on the expected field and the browser dev tools are giving me the following error message:

Any ideas? Am I doing something wrong or is this a bug?

Regards,
Patrick

SAP Build SAP Build Apps

entry.title: SAP Build Apps: New Entities not added to the entity list under Roles.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Build Apps Experts,

I've encountered a challenge regarding new entity creation with the introduction of Roles. Initially, after creating entities, I defined roles and successfully added users. However, when attempting to create a new entity subsequently, it does not appear in the list of entities under "Roles". I've ensured deployment after creating the new entity and even tried re-logging in, just in case 😕 , yet it remains absent from the list. 

I expect that any new entity created should automatically be available in the list, allowing us to designate actions for specific roles. At the very least, there should be an option to manually add the new entity if it isn't automatically listed.

Looking forward to resolving this issue.

 SAP Build Apps

entry.title: SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Getting Session Expired issue when trying to give temporary pin from SAP Build preview app from mobile to SAP build portal

#SAP Build App #Making Barcode Scanner App

entry.title: SAP Build App After Deployed into BTP getting Error while Open App Error GET --500 Missing zone info
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have SAP Build App trial version and create application and deploy into SAP BTP and successfully deployed into SAP BTP and display as HTML5 Application.

While Click on that App system is open into New browser but getting error as below

GET request to /buildappsXXXXX.buildappsXXXXX-1.2.1/index.html completed with status 500 Missing zone information

 

Kindly help me what is missing in SAP BTP, or SAP Build App. I can able to preview the application in SAP Build App but not after the Deployment into SAP BTP.

Thanks in Advance.
Regards,
Mithun

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Configure OData integration selected fields not displayed in config relative path
entry.content:
I am creating an application using 'SAP Build Apps', creating a classic data entity.  

When I create the integration thus:

Configure ODAT integration

and successfully test with these selections:

Test

The Relative Path in the config tab remains unchanged:

config

Saving the resource simply defaults to the selection of all fields.

I hope I have missed something here and would appreciate some assistance.
